================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 44 89 4A BE F5
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x1A
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 124

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1875
ReflectedCC  : 0x1A
PayloadLen   : 124

[EPS P60 ACU GET TABLE HK]

[Inputs]
c_in[0..5]: 95 106 107 103 14 12
v_in[0..5]: 16862 16840 16853 16816 15450 16207

[Bus/Temp]
vbat: 16222
vcc : 3279
temp[0..2]: 192 193 193

[MPPT]
mppt_mode: 1
vboost[0..5]: 18333 17768 18548 18333 17983 17983
power[0..5]: 1601 1785 1803 1732 216 194

[DAC]
dac_en[0..2]: 1 1 1

bootcause : 0
bootcnt   : 1
uptime    : 142
resetcause: 0xCCE0

[MPPT Timing]
mppt_time  : 5
mppt_period: 1

[Device]
device_type[0..7]: 22 0 49 0 0 0 7 1

[WDT]
wdt_cnt_gnd : 65793
